compiled_state.title: UPDATE: add dependency pre-scan as Phase 1 Step 0 in onboarding SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
4c55-0c7a — As a new project member, I am prompted to install missing dependencies before onboarding proceeds

## testing_mode
UPDATE

## What
Add a new `### Step 0: Dependency Pre-Scan` section as the first step inside `## Phase 1: Auto-Detection` in `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md`.

The step runs before Step 1 (Read Project Files) and before any user interaction.

## Implementation Details

**Required deps check:**
- bash >= 4.0: check via `/bin/bash --version` (NOT PATH-resolved bash — must use /bin/bash to catch macOS default bash 3)
- GNU coreutils: check via `date --version` or `gdate --version` (GNU coreutils provide gdate on macOS Homebrew)
- git: check via `command -v git`

**If required deps missing:**
- Collect all missing into one list
- Present a single `brew install ...` command covering all missing required deps
- Pause for user confirmation before continuing
- If Homebrew unavailable: display explicit out-of-scope message (per scope boundary in story), do NOT attempt to install

**Optional deps (ast-grep, semgrep):**
- Check `command -v sg` and `command -v semgrep`
- If missing, OFFER (do not require) them with a timeout (e.g., 30s) so restricted networks don't hang
- Never block progress on optional dep answer

**Phase counter:**
- Display uses same `(Phase N of Y)` format defined in b267-a3b9 — dep check inherits Phase 1's counter entry (no PHASE_PLAN modification needed since Step 0 is part of Phase 1)

## Files to Modify
- `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md` — add `### Step 0: Dependency Pre-Scan` as first step under `## Phase 1: Auto-Detection`

## Acceptance Criteria
(from story done definitions)
- Step 0 checks bash >= 4.0 via /bin/bash --version, GNU coreutils, and git before asking any questions
- If required deps missing: single brew install command presented, pauses for confirmation
- Optional deps offered separately, never block, timeout applied
- test_dependency_check_section_present (Task 1) passes GREEN after this change
